member.name: M:RoomRental.Presentation.Controllers.AddressesController.GetAddressForApartment(System.Guid,System.Guid)
member.summary: Retrieves the address for a specific apartment
member.param: The unique identifier of the apartment
The unique identifier of the address
member.returns: The address associated with the specified apartment
member.response: Apartment with the provided ID was not found

member.name: M:RoomRental.Presentation.Controllers.AddressesController.UpdateAddressForApartment(System.Guid,System.Guid,Shared.DataTransferObjects.AddressForUpdateDto)
member.summary: Fully updates the address for a specific apartment
member.param: The unique identifier of the apartment
The unique identifier of the address to update
member.response: Invalid request payload or missing required fields
Apartment or address with the provided ID was not found

member.name: M:RoomRental.Presentation.Controllers.AddressesController.PartiallyUpdateAddressForApartment(System.Guid,System.Guid,Microsoft.AspNetCore.JsonPatch.JsonPatchDocument{Shared.DataTransferObjects.AddressForUpdateDto})
member.summary: Partially updates the address for a specific apartment
member.param: The unique identifier of the apartment
The unique identifier of the address to update
The JSON Patch document containing the partial update operations
member.response: Apartment or address with the provided ID was not found

member.name: M:RoomRental.Presentation.Controllers.ApartmentsController.GetApartments
member.returns: A list of all available apartments

member.name: M:RoomRental.Presentation.Controllers.ApartmentsController.GetApartment(System.Guid)
member.summary: Retrieves a specific apartment by ID
member.param: The unique identifier of the apartment
member.returns: A single apartment matching the provided ID
member.response: Apartment with the provided ID was not found
